CREATE TABLE polygons (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY);
SELECT ST_Affine(geom, 30, 3, 1, 0.3, 0.001, 0.002) FROM polygons WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE transformed_polygons AS SELECT ST_Affine(geom, 10, 2, 3, 0.5, 0.005, 0.002) AS geom FROM polygons;
CREATE TABLE new_polygons AS SELECT id, ST_Affine(geom, 15, 0, 0, 0.1, 0.0001, 0.0002) FROM polygons WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM polygons WHERE id % 2 = 0);
SELECT a.id, ST_Affine(a.geom, 50, 2, 3, 1, 0.01, 0.01) FROM polygons a JOIN polygons b ON ST_Intersects(a.geom, b.geom) WHERE a.id <> b.id;
SELECT id, ST_Affine(geom, -20, 4, 1, 0.5, -0.001, -0.002) FROM polygons WHERE ST_Area(geom) > 1;
DELETE FROM polygons WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM polygons WHERE ST_Area(geom) < 0.5);
